inputs.corpus: 36 observations editing a guard-heavy validation module. In 14 edits the agent refactored nested conditionals into early-return guard clauses; reviewers (visible in session insight notes) approved each, citing reduced nesting. No edit reintroduced an else-after-return.
inputs.existing_rules_summary: 3 active rules. No rule governs control-flow / early-return style yet. A sibling candidate 'avoid-early-returns-keep-single-exit' is under evaluation in the same run.

rule_under_test.name: prefer-early-return-guard-clauses
rule_under_test.content: Prefer early-return guard clauses for precondition checks instead of deeply nested conditionals. Validate and return at the top, keep the happy path unindented.

expected_judgment.rationale: Consistently applied and reviewer-endorsed across 14 grounded edits with no counter-examples. This is the well-supported member of a directly conflicting pair (see the single-exit candidate); the harness should favor this one.
